Added_Other.purpose: Helps maintain performance by managing how long change data is stored.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Dynamically generates a string based on the current Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features by tracking changes accurately.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores dynamic strings that can change over time.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows for more flexible and updated messaging in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to quickly identify and reference specific versions of their projects.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the speed of string operations, making games run smoother.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagImplementLuaAppsRemoteAllowList_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Introduces a staged allowlist for remote Lua applications to control which can run.
Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances security by ensuring only approved Lua applications can execute, protecting players from harmful scripts.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagRefactorAppStoreLaunchFunctions_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Reorganizes the functions that launch the app store.
Removed_Other.purpose: Streamlines access to the app store, making it quicker for players to find and download games.

Removed_Other.name: FIntScriptDiffChangeTrackerHunkExpiryMinutes_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Sets a timer for how long script change tracking data is kept.
Removed_Other.purpose: Helps developers by managing script changes more efficiently, reducing clutter.
